message:
fix: correct MS color gradient and update subtitle to eleven tools

- Change MS color from "from-teal-400 to-emerald-500" to "from-teal-500 to-emerald-600"
  to match tldr-content.ts and the defined gradient in colors.ts
- Update subtitle from "Ten tools" to "Eleven tools"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

-    color: "from-teal-400 to-emerald-500",
+    color: "from-teal-500 to-emerald-600",
     tagline: "Complete skill management platform",
     description:
       "Store skills, search them, track effectiveness, package for sharing, and integrate with AI agents via MCP server. Skills come from hand-written files, CASS mining, bundles, or guided workflows.",
